name: Bye Bye Buddy
description:
I will not forget you. You will always stay with me

These may be the last words you say to your friend. Your dog is sick and there is no treatment. How you decide to face this situation is your decision.

When a loved one has to leave, it leaves us with a void and only you know how you would face it. Death hurts a lot. It takes away our loved ones and part of our hearts.

Will you force Buddy to take treatments and medicines that selfishly extend his life in order to escape from your own pain and his inevitable fate? Will you put him to sleep because you love him too much? Will you be with him until the end or will you leave him in the hands of others?

In memory of Toto. The best dog in the world.
creator: Remi Hart
